deltas.title: Manage your deltas
deltas.description: Create and edit your deltas for the habit

tooltip.title: What is a delta?
tooltip.description:
A delta is a quantity that you completed for the habit.

For example, if you drank 2 liters of water in a day, your delta would be 2 or 2000 if you prefer in milliliters.

You have complete freedom to use deltas as you wish.

fill_delta_modal.title: Fill the delta
fill_delta_modal.description: Fill the delta for the habit

delete_habit_modal.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_habit_modal.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the habit **{{name}}** and remove its data from our servers.

description.create: Set the name and type of the delta
description.edit: Edit the name and type of the delta

empty_category.description: Add a habit or drag one here to get started.
empty_category.drop_description: Release to move the habit to this category
